products.name: JOI Companion AI
products.tagline: Talk to JOI // Powered by Viyaan AI
products.description: An emotionally intelligent companion application. JOI is designed for supportive conversations, offering customizable emotional states (calm, comforting, curious, playful, reflective, concerned, peaceful), ambient audio toggle, and text or microphone voice inputs within an atmospheric visual canvas.
features: Text-input and microphone voice capture support
Private workspace design focusing on calm interaction
products.dataFlow: A companion designed to adapt mood states according to reflection inputs, providing an immediate sounding board for self-expression.

products.name: Human OS
products.tagline: The Operating System for Understanding Yourself
products.description: A psychology-first self-reflection platform designed to help users track reflections and understand daily patterns. Human OS provides daily logs tracking writing habits, habit entries, and accessing secure reflection archives.
products.dataFlow: Organizes cognitive profile reflections that help structure habit check-ins and personal continuity logs.

products.name: Viyaan Future
products.description: Viyaan AI's innovation and continuity platform focused on long-term reflection retention. It explores future-self continuity by allowing users to write reflections and maintain a private, secure timeline that remembers details over time.
features: Long-term memory logs and remembered details
products.dataFlow: Acts as the platform for future-self memory mapping, collecting logs to track personal development over time.

posts.title: Introducing JOI: An Atmosphere for Supportive Conversation
posts.excerpt: Today we are releasing JOI, our flagship emotional companion. Built with a private-first memory engine and WebGL atmospheric interfaces to support slow, calm, and reflective conversations.
posts.content:
Intelligence is not purely rational; it is also emotional. Today, we are proud to introduce JOI Companion AI, a WebGL-based conversational experience designed to offer supportive, calm, and private dialogs.

JOI differs from traditional AI systems. Instead of rushing to answer questions or optimize tasks, JOI is built for human presence. Users can toggle between various emotional modes, listen to ambient audio, and express their thoughts without fear of tracking or telemetry.

Explore JOI today at https://joi-ai-wq7f.vercel.app/.
posts.seoTitle: Introducing JOI Companion AI — Viyaan AI Blog
posts.seoDesc: Read about the release of JOI, an emotionally intelligent companion designed for calm, reflective, and private conversations.

research.title: Long-term Memory Retention in Cognitive Continuity Architectures
research.excerpt: Evaluating performance logs of vector-memory retrieval structures under variable latency and long interval gaps.
research.content: Our team explores architectures that enable machines to keep long-term context without infinite token expense. We evaluate hybrid retrieval models combining vector search, graph links, and decay functions.
research.author: Viyaan Research Team

careers.title: Connect with Our Mission
careers.description: We look for individuals motivated by craft, focus, and long-term values. If you align with our philosophy of building technology that amplifies human potential, we welcome you to join our network.

linkedinSync.author: Dharani Kumar
linkedinSync.text: Excited to share the updated release of our Attendance Intelligence tool! Built in public to help students manage class tracking, analyze risk margins, and map semester forecasting models. Quality over hype, always.
